PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROCKMORE, GRADY J. III

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVENDANO, JOSEPH H.,JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROCKMORE, GRADY J. III STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY $1,974.79 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,089.79, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $3,038.14 AND ATTRIBUTES 35% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. DEFENDANT (STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY) BE DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY AVENDANO, JOSEPH H.,JR. AS TO DEFENDANT ROCKMORE, GRADY J. III STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
